TANAY SACHDEVA

Backend Engineer · Full Stack Developer · Systems Thinker

Undergraduate at Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology.Building fault-tolerant backends, distributed systems, andthings that work correctly the first time - and when they do not,recover gracefully. 99.02 Percentile in JEE Mains Mathematics.

Current Focus

Systems built to survive pressure.

The new atmosphere trades paper minimalism for something darker: obsidian surfaces, cold moonlight, ember traces, and a pressure-heavy tone inspired by Shadow Slave.

Experience

Built in hostile environments.

Backend-first work across real-time scheduling, microservices, APIs, and reliability.

Aug 2025 - Present

Full Stack Intern

Convivity Technologies - Delaware, USA - Remote

Built a real-time calendar scheduling backend using Node.js(Hono framework) deployed on Cloudflare Workers. DesignedRESTful APIs for user and event management with JWT andOAuth authentication. Optimized PostgreSQL queries usingPrisma ORM, reducing average query latency by ~30%. Workedwithin a microservices-based backend architecture.

honocloudflare workerspostgresqlprismajwtoauth
Jul 2025 - Aug 2025

Full Stack Intern

VetikalLabs - Bangalore - Remote

Developed a full-stack Job Summarizer application usingNext.js and Node.js. Integrated file storage with AWS S3.Added logging and testing to improve application reliability.

next.jsnode.jsaws s3jest
Jun 2025 - Aug 2025

Open Source Web Developer

GirlScript Summer of Code (GSSoC) - Remote

Contributed to open-source projects by resolving issues,implementing new features, and optimizing performance.Collaborated with maintainers to enhance full-stack applications.

Projects

Engines, channels, and systems with teeth.

Every project card is now native Next source, editable, and responsive on mobile.

01

Real-Time Chat Application

High-performance encrypted messaging system.

WebSocket-based real-time communication with AES-encryptedmessage payloads and JWT authentication. Managed userpresence, message delivery, and persistence.

Stack

MERNSocket.ioJWTAES EncryptionWebSockets
02

AI Notes Summarizer

PDF-to-intelligence pipeline.

Notes summarization tool with flashcard generation fromPDF uploads. Integrated Gemini API for summarization.Reduced manual note processing time by ~70%.

Stack

Next.jsGemini APIJWTMongoDB
03In Active Development

Zaprun - Workflow Execution Engine

Deterministic, fault-tolerant workflow engine.

API-first execution engine with durable state. Event-drivenstep orchestration via Kafka. Outbox pattern for guaranteedevent publishing and failure recovery. Designed for retries,replay, and full auditability.

Architecture

TypeScriptExpressKafkaPostgreSQLPrismaOutbox PatternMicroservices
04

NovelGrab

Web novel downloader with containerized architecture.

Multi-container Docker stack for downloading and managingweb novels. Built for reliability and scalability.

Stack

Next.jsNode.jsRedisMongoDBDocker
05

3-to-8 Decoder on Spartan-6 FPGA

Hardware logic on silicon.

Designed and implemented a 3-to-8 decoder in Digital SystemDesign lab using Verilog. Demonstrated practical understandingof digital circuits and hardware logic synthesis.

Stack

VerilogSpartan-6 FPGADigital Systems
